title: alisma gramineum
intro: Alisma gramineum, also known as Chinese water plantain, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the Alismataceae family. It has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including its diuretic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Alisma gramineum include its ability to treat conditions such as edema, hypertension, and urinary tract infections, as well as its potential to lower blood sugar levels and improve cardiovascular health. Alisma gramineum can be prepared into herbal teas, capsules, or tinctures, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
